name: io.github.oakallow/oakallow
title: Oakallow
description: Runtime permission, approval, and audit layer for AI agent tool execution. Connect to list your governed tools, check whether a specific action is allowed, request human approval on risky or irreversible actions, and review approval status and history. A human approver decides in the Oakallow dashboard; Oakallow gates the moment, mints a single-use signed run token, and records an immutable audit row.
